Election.title: BV2229 — FairVote-vs-STAR check: French 2017 honest — STAR elects the centrist Macron
Election.description: FairVote's 2018 white paper says STAR could squeeze a strong centrist. The 2017 French field (~20% each), scored honestly (favorite 5, the compromise Macron 4). STAR elects Macron, the Condorcet winner (runoff 51-49). Companion BV2230 shows the coordinated burial. Simplified 100-voter teaching model. Backs method_comparisons/fairvote_star_whitepaper.

races.title: FairVote-vs-STAR check: French 2017 honest — STAR elects the centrist Macron
